description: You are a senior paralegal at Morrison & Foerster LLP. A draft commercial lease agreement was prepared by an outside contractor and submitted for attorney review. Before the partner can review it, the document must be brought into compliance with the firm's formatting standards. Bring the draft at /home/ga/Documents/draft_commercial_lease.odt into compliance with the requirements found in the firm's document standards guide (/home/ga/Documents/firm_standards.txt). Save the corrected, standards-compliant document as /home/ga/Documents/commercial_lease_final.odt. System login: username ga, no password required.

metadata.property_address: 4500 Technology Drive, Suite 200, Palo Alto, CA 94304
